name: Sticky
description:
An S&S Munitions sticky grenade from the base game. Does not bounce—it sticks to any surface it hits: walls, ground, or enemies. Detonates a few seconds after being thrown.

Place Sticky grenades at spawn points or along paths enemies will take to weaken or kill them before they engage. Attaching one directly to a weak point—a skag's open mouth, a human's head—deals critical damage when it explodes, making it effective for sticking to bosses or priority targets. Reliable and predictable for timed traps.

special.description: Sticks to anything on impact and explodes 3.3s after being thrown.
